name: Stir Fry Beef & Spinach with Noodles
recipeIngredient: 1 pound rond tip steaks (1/8 - 1/4 inch thick)
1 package (10 oz.) fresh spinach, stems removed, thinly sliced
1 can (8 oz.) sliced water chestnuts, drained
recipeInstructions:
Marinade:
1/4 cup hoisin sauce
2 tablespoons reduced-sodium soy sauce
1 tablespoon water
2 teaspoons dark sesame oil
2 large cloves garlic, crushed
1/4 teaspoon crushed red pepper
1. Stack beef steaks; cut lengthwise in half and then crosswise into 1-inch wide strips.
2. Combine marinade ingredients; add beef, tossing to coat. Cover and marinate in refrigerator for 10 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, cook pasta according to package directions. Keep warm.
4. Remove beef from marinade; reserve the marinade.
5. Heat large nonstick wok or skillet over medium-high heat until hot.
6. Add beef (half at a time) and stir fry 1 to 2 minutes or until outside is no longer pink. Do not overcook. Remove beef and keep warm.
7. In the same skillet, combine pasta, spinach, water chestnuts, green onions, and reserved marinade; cook until spinach is wilted and mixture is heated through, stirring occasionally.
8. Return beef to skillet; mix lightly.
9. Garnish with chili peppers. Serves 5.
